captures.frame_separator: double newline (\n\n) per SSE spec; each frame = 'event: <name>' + 'data: <json>'

dom_render_structure.user_message: div[data-testid="user-message"] (classes: font-large !font-user-message grid grid-cols-1), parent div.flex-1
dom_render_structure.assistant_message: div.font-claude-message inside wrapper div[data-is-streaming] (group relative pb-3); data-is-streaming toggles true->false on stream end

captures.framework: React SPA (no #__next; no Next.js root detected; client-rendered chat-ui-core, Tailwind utility classes)

screenshot_name: ss_2865hl0n8 (in-tool capture; not saved to disk)
notes: etap-bypassed clean baseline. Logged-in as janghee. Benign prompt sent, Claude replied with a one-sentence Korean greeting. Chat POST /completion returned 200 streaming. Raw SSE body not capturable via Claude-in-Chrome (taint-guard); transport confirmed SSE by response_content_type=text/event-stream + /completion endpoint. Title auto-gen via separate POST /title. No console errors.
